title: opilia angustifolia
intro: Opilia angustifolia, also known as the Indian nettle, is a plant species that belongs to the Opiliaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Opilia angustifolia include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or a paste, often mixed with other herbs, to create a topical application for skin issues or a medicinal drink to address various health concerns.
